title: eleocharis glaucovirens
intro: Eleocharis glaucovirens, also known as the glaucous spike-rush, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant is said to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Eleocharis glaucovirens is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
